era: Seattle, 1990s underground. Active from 1988. The anti-grunge. Ambient, ethereal, electronic, psychedelic, world music with live visuals.

location.origin: Seattle, Washington. Active from 1988. One of Seattle's longest-running experimental acts.
location.formative: 1990s Seattle underground alongside grunge. The anti-grunge. Pursuing ambient/electronic/psychedelic aesthetics while grunge dominated.
location.career: Sky Cries Mary -- psychedelic/electronic band led by Roderick Romero and Anisa Romero (DJ Anisa). Rockville Records. Ethereal/Electronic at Genre Stage 72. E=3. THE QUARTER-MARK -- degree 90 of 360, 25% complete.

members.name: Roderick Romero
members.note: Co-leader. Multi-decade commitment to the ethereal/electronic vision.

members.name: Anisa Romero (DJ Anisa)
members.note: Co-leader. DJ sets and electronic textures integral to the sound. Audiovisual integration.

associated_musicians.name: Chong the Nomad
associated_musicians.note: Both electronic, both experimental. Chong is beat-driven; Sky Cries Mary is ambient and psychedelic. Different eras.

associated_musicians.name: The Postal Service
associated_musicians.note: Both electronic-centered. Postal Service is structured pop; Sky Cries Mary is ambient psychedelia.

associated_musicians.name: Pearl Jam
associated_musicians.note: Pearl Jam was the grunge that dominated. Sky Cries Mary was the ethereal that coexisted. The parallel scene.

associated_musicians.name: Jimi Hendrix
associated_musicians.note: Hendrix inaugurated Seattle's psychedelic legacy. Sky Cries Mary extends it into the electronic era.

associated_musicians.name: Shawn Smith
associated_musicians.note: Both 1990s Seattle acts outside grunge's mainstream. Smith soulful; Sky Cries Mary ethereal. Both the other Seattle.

theory_nodes.concept: THE QUARTER-MARK -- degree 90 of 360 = 25% complete; first quadrant closes; 72 genre stages, 91 acoustic elements, 91 patterns, 5 return artists
examples: Degree 90 = 25% of 360. The quarter-mark. The first quadrant closes.
72 genre stages in 90 degrees. 91 acoustic elements. 91 patterns. 5 return artists.
The engine has mapped one quarter of Seattle's musical landscape.
The second quadrant (91-180) begins at degree 91.
theory_nodes.description: THE QUARTER-MARK. 90/360 = 25%. First quadrant complete. 72 genres, 91 elements, 91 patterns, 5 returns.

ancestors: Every prior degree contributes to the quarter-mark statistics.
genealogy.relationship: Quarter-mark at degree 90. Next structural milestone: 120 (one-third), 180 (half).

theory_nodes.concept: The ambient drift (ninety-first acoustic element -- Sky Cries Mary, synthesizer pads, processed guitar, world percussion, ethereal vocals, slowly evolving sonic landscape, music drifts rather than drives, ambient immersion)
examples: Sky Cries Mary (degree 90) -- layers of synthesizer, processed guitar, world percussion, ethereal vocals. The ambient drift.
Contrast with the baroque whisper (degree 89, Parenthetical Girls) -- extreme dynamics. The ambient drift smooths out all extremes.
The engine moves from theatrical drama (89) to ambient immersion (90). From the proscenium to the planetarium.
Music drifts rather than drives. Changes gradually. The listener floats.
theory_nodes.description: The ambient drift is the ninety-first acoustic element. Synthesizer layers, processed guitar, ethereal vocals. Ambient immersion. Drifting.

ancestors: The baroque whisper (degree 89, Parenthetical Girls) -- extreme dynamics. The ambient drift smooths everything.
The electronic pulse (degree 86, Postal Service) -- structured electronic. The ambient drift dissolves structure.
genealogy.relationship: Ninety-one acoustic elements across ninety degrees. Track element 92 at degree 91.

theory_nodes.concept: The parallel scene (ninety-first artist-city pattern -- operating alongside a dominant scene but pursuing a different aesthetic; the anti-grunge; the other thing happening; every scene has a parallel scene; every spotlight creates a shadow)
examples: Sky Cries Mary (degree 90) -- in Seattle during grunge but not grunge. The parallel scene.
When people say 'Seattle in the 1990s,' they mean grunge. But Seattle in the 1990s was also ambient electronic psychedelia.
Every scene has a parallel scene. Every spotlight creates a shadow where other music thrives.
The parallel scene is the music that history forgot to document.
theory_nodes.description: The parallel scene is the ninety-first artist-city pattern. Operating alongside a dominant scene with a different aesthetic. The anti-grunge.

ancestors: The theatrical outsider (degree 89, Parenthetical Girls) -- outside institutions. The parallel scene is inside the city but outside the narrative.
The solo distillation (degree 88, Dawson) -- format reduction. The parallel scene is about visibility, not format.
genealogy.relationship: Ninety-one artist-city patterns across ninety degrees. Track pattern 92 at degree 91.

theory_nodes.concept: Ethereal/Electronic at Genre Stage 72 -- synthesizers + ambient + psychedelic + world; the electronic serves the ethereal; immersive rather than confrontational
examples: Sky Cries Mary (degree 90) -- Ethereal/Electronic at Genre Stage 72.
Distinguished from electronic pop (Postal Service, 86) and experimental electronic (Chong, 44).
The electronic serves the ethereal, not the other way around.
theory_nodes.description: Ethereal/Electronic at Genre Stage 72. Synthesizers + ambient + psychedelic. Immersive. The electronic serves the ethereal.

ancestors: Avant-Pop (degree 89) at Genre Stage 71. Genre stages continue.
Electronic pop (degree 86, Postal Service). Different electronic approach.
genealogy.relationship: Genre Stage 72 at degree 90. Track at 91.

theory_nodes.concept: E=3 at degree 90 -- immersive but not aggressive; the sound surrounds rather than attacks; ambient energy; presence through envelopment
examples: Sky Cries Mary (degree 90) -- E=3. Immersive presence.
The sound surrounds rather than attacks. Ambient energy.
Presence through envelopment, not force.
theory_nodes.description: E=3 at degree 90. Immersive presence. Ambient energy. Surrounds rather than attacks.

ancestors: E=3 at degree 89 (Parenthetical Girls). Continues at E=3.

theory_nodes.concept: Rockville Records -- Seattle-based independent label; part of Seattle's label infrastructure alongside Sub Pop and others; Sky Cries Mary's label home
examples: Sky Cries Mary (degree 90) -- Rockville Records.
Seattle-based independent label. Part of the city's label ecosystem.
Another node in Seattle's independent label infrastructure.
theory_nodes.description: Rockville Records. Seattle-based independent label. Sky Cries Mary's label home.

ancestors: Seattle's label ecosystem: Sub Pop, Barsuk, K Records, now Rockville.

cross_references.relationship: Electronic connection. Both electronic, both experimental. Chong beat-driven (contemporary); Sky Cries Mary ambient and psychedelic (1990s). Different eras of Seattle electronic music.
Electronic parallel. Both electronic-centered. Postal Service structured pop; Sky Cries Mary ambient psychedelia. Two poles of Seattle electronic music.
1990s Seattle parallel. Pearl Jam grunge dominated; Sky Cries Mary ethereal coexisted. Same city, same decade, different aesthetics. The parallel scene.
Psychedelic lineage. Hendrix inaugurated Seattle's psychedelic legacy. Sky Cries Mary extends it into the electronic era.
Scene native, 1990s. Both 1990s Seattle acts outside grunge mainstream. Smith soulful; Sky Cries Mary ethereal. Both the other Seattle.
